title: OpenAI releases GPT-5 with real-time reasoning and tool use
description: OpenAI's latest flagship model introduces a 'thinking' mode that shows step-by-step reasoning. Enterprise customers can now chain tools like web search, code execution, and document analysis in a single prompt, dramatically reducing the need for custom integrations.

title: EU AI Act enforcement begins: companies must now document AI decision-making
description: The European Union has started enforcing the first wave of AI Act requirements. Companies deploying high-risk AI systems must now maintain detailed audit logs, provide explainability reports, and designate an AI compliance officer — or face fines up to 3% of global revenue.

title: Anthropic launches Claude for Enterprise with 500K context window
description: Anthropic's latest enterprise tier supports a 500,000-token context window — enough to process entire codebases or year-long email threads in one go. The release also includes fine-tuning capabilities and an admin dashboard for usage analytics.

title: AI agents now handle 40% of customer support tickets at top SaaS firms
description: A new McKinsey study finds that leading SaaS companies have automated 40% of Tier-1 customer support using AI agents. The agents handle password resets, billing queries, and onboarding questions without human escalation, reducing CSAT response time by 68%.

title: Google DeepMind's Gemini 2.5 beats human expert benchmarks on 12 domains
description: Google DeepMind released Gemini 2.5, which surpasses average human expert performance on benchmarks spanning medicine, law, financial analysis, and software engineering. The model uses a new 'mixture of experts' architecture that dynamically routes queries to specialised sub-models.

title: Nvidia announces Blackwell Ultra GPUs optimised for inference at scale
description: Nvidia's new Blackwell Ultra series delivers 4x inference throughput compared to H100s, targeting companies running large-scale AI inference in production. Pricing drops make deploying LLMs 60% cheaper per token than last year.

title: AI-powered product analytics tools now automatically surface churn signals
description: A new wave of AI-native product analytics platforms (including Amplitude AI and Mixpanel Intelligence) can now automatically identify behavioural patterns that predict churn 30 days in advance, suggest A/B tests to address them, and even draft the product brief.

title: Microsoft Copilot now auto-generates PRDs from meeting transcripts
description: Microsoft's latest Copilot update for Teams and Office 365 can listen to a product discovery meeting, extract requirements discussed, and generate a structured PRD with user stories, acceptance criteria, and open questions — ready for Jira import.
